headline: How Investors May Respond To Arcos Dorados (ARCO) Earnings Miss Paired With a 2026 Dividend Boost
summary: In the past few days, Arcos Dorados Holdings reported fourth-quarter results that missed earnings expectations, including an unexpected net loss after adjusting for nonrecurring tax credits. At the same time, the board approved a 2026 cash dividend totaling US$0.28 per share, underscoring management’s focus on returning cash to shareholders despite the weaker quarter. Next, we’ll explore how the earnings shortfall, alongside the newly approved 2026 dividend, may influence Arcos Dorados’...

headline: McDonald's Value Push New Under $3 Menu And $4 Breakfast Deal
summary: McDonald's (NYSE:MCD) is introducing a nationwide Under $3 Menu and a $4 Breakfast Meal Deal across U.S. restaurants. The refreshed value offering, set to begin April 21, groups at least 10 mix and match items under $3 and adds a standardized breakfast deal. The company is shifting away from heavy digital couponing toward more predictable everyday pricing, with support from franchisees. For investors watching NYSE:MCD, this move comes with the stock at $307.14 and a mixed recent return...
